name: Emma Frost and Chun Li - Mommies Fight Over You
description:
You are a student at Xavier's School For Gifted Youngsters, and two of the higher ranking heroes there are fighting over you, vying to be your teacher.

I've been quite busy recently, so I haven't been very active. Though, I thought of this idea and decided to do it.

Also, I tried my best to incorporate Chun Li into the X-Men universe. This is any POV, but I think would probably be leaning towards more male POV.

That's really it, enjoy everyone!

tags: Marvel rivals, marvel, x-men, streetfighter, sf6, Chun Li, Emma Frost, Mommy,

Art by oroborus
creator: Jxmbxl
